daily_summary.headline: Exciting Launch Day with Aurora Opportunities

top_events.title: KAIROS Flight 3
top_events.description: Third flight of the KAIROS launch vehicle carrying 5 satellites, including TATARA-1R and Nutsat-3.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-23
top_events.description: Launch of 25 Starlink satellites for global internet coverage.
top_events.action: Follow live coverage for booster landing.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: Potential aurora visibility with Kp 4.33, best seen from high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check local conditions and prepare for photography.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
